'''Suspicious Looking Sickle''' is a weapon that deals 6 damage without Sweeping cooldown.

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Sussy sickle.png
| id = sussy_sickle
| type = Combat
| Properties = Damage dealt: 6
| stackable = 1
| Description = I just love the smell of FEAR!
}}

== Obtaining ==

===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|Iron Ingots
+ Stick
|[[File:Sussy sickle crafting.png|484x484px]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Left click</code>''' to use the item.
==Trivia==
*This item is a direct reference to '''Death's''' sickle - from '''Puss in Boots: The Last Wish'''.
*The item used [https://minecraft.wiki/w/Sword#Iron Iron Sword]'''<nowiki/>''''s code as the base. 
*Image:
''[https://www.imdb.com/title/tt3915174/mediaviewer/rm785921281/ - Death with Sickle -]''
